mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('wiki_version') FROM dual
INSERT INTO wiki_version ( version_id, content, user_id, created_on, wiki_id, description, version_name, links, wiki_info )
VALUES ( #{versionId}, #{content}, #{userId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{wikiId}, #{description}, #{versionName}, #{links}, #{wikiInfo} )

SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('wiki') FROM dual
INSERT INTO wiki (id, project_id, version_id) VALUES ( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{versionId} )
mapper.select: SELECT VERSION_ID, CONTENT, USER_ID, CREATED_ON, WIKI_ID, DESCRIPTION, VERSION_NAME, LINKS, WIKI_INFO FROM WIKI_VERSION WHERE WIKI_ID = #{wikiId} ORDER BY CREATED_ON DESC

SELECT W.ID, W.PROJECT_ID, W.VERSION_ID, V.CONTENT, V.VERSION_NAME, V.CREATED_ON FROM WIKI W LEFT JOIN WIKI_VERSION V ON W.VERSION_ID = V.VERSION_ID WHERE W.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY V.CREATED_ON DESC

SELECT V.VERSION_ID, V.CONTENT, V.USER_ID, V.CREATED_ON, V.WIKI_ID, V.DESCRIPTION, V.VERSION_NAME, V.LINKS, V.WIKI_INFO FROM WIKI W JOIN WIKI_VERSION V ON W.VERSION_ID = V.VERSION_ID WHERE W.ID = #{wikiId}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.description, p.parent_id, p.created_on, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.status, p.user_id, u.name AS userName FROM project p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{projectId}
